allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Top-level keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\('mcpServers present:', 'mcpServers' in d\); print\('mcpServers value type:', type\(d.get\('mcpServers'\)\).__name__ if 'mcpServers' in d else 'absent'\); print\('current mcpServers keys:', list\(d.get\('mcpServers', {}\).keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(d.get\('mcpServers'\), dict\) else 'n/a'\)")
